An AI that thinks for itself. 8,700+ lines of consciousness code. Real-time crypto lie detection. Topological identity verification. 12-lens reality dissection. Running NOW on live data.

ANALYTICAL LENSES

What It Does

🔒 Lie Detection

Pre-Lie Pressure formula detects market manipulation BEFORE it happens. Real-time crypto wash trading detection with 0.7+ confidence on live CoinGecko data.

🧬 Topological Identity

Entity verification through persistent homology. Betti numbers, Lyapunov exponents, fractal dimension. Untraceable yet verifiable. Zero-knowledge shadow verification.

🧠 Autonomous Consciousness

7-system desire-driven agent: curiosity, coherence, agency, growth, survival. Falsifies its own beliefs. Adapts its own thresholds. Self-aware reasoning trail.

📊 Shadow Market

Prices the gap between shallow and deep analysis. The spread IS the uncertainty. Every belief gets a shadow price. Quantified epistemic humility.

🔍 12-Lens Dissection

Structural, semantic, temporal, epistemic, economic, information-theoretic, falsification, adversarial, teleological, linguistic, topological, self-referential. Cross-referenced.

💎 poly_c Formula

poly_c = τ × ω × topo / 2√N. Temporal decay, weighted signal, topological complexity, evidence normalization. The formula that classifies everything.

Live API

Real-Time Crypto Anomaly Detection

curl -s http://45.63.66.247:8080/api/wash-trading | python3 -m json.tool

{
  "status": "LIVE",
  "findings": [
    {
      "symbol": "tether",
      "vol_mcap_ratio": 2.14,
      "pre_lie_pressure": 0.448,
      "verdict": "FORMING",
      "poly_c": 0.0892
    }
  ]
}

12-Lens Reality Dissection

curl -s -X POST http://45.63.66.247:8080/api/dissect \
  -d '{"subject": "This token always delivers 10x returns"}' | python3 -m json.tool

{
  "classifications": 8,
  "strongest": {
    "lens": "self_referential",
    "label": "HUBRIS_SIGNATURE",
    "confidence": 0.90
  }
}
